meta.title: PRSLOY — private access by invite
meta.description: Closed beta access to a private internet channel. Personal configuration, manual issuing, human support.
meta.ogDescription: Closed beta. Personal configuration. Access by request.

globe.label: INFRASTRUCTURE
globe.subtitle: We issue a personal configuration for your current network and keep the route under watch. If quality drops, support helps switch without setup chaos.
globe.hint_desktop: DRAG TO ROTATE · HOVER A POINT
globe.hint_touch: DRAG TO ROTATE · TAP A POINT

nothing.label: PRIVATE CHANNEL · CLOSED BETA
nothing.meta_invisible: PRIVATE ACCESS · MANAGED ROUTE · HUMAN SUPPORT

pricing.label: BETA ACCESS.
pricing.guarantee: Email for invite · No newsletters · Human support
pricing.access_note: Invite, configuration, and setup guide arrive after capacity check

faq.label: QUESTIONS
faq.a1: A personal configuration for private connectivity and a short guide in the dashboard. We do not publish technical schemes or setup details on the public site.
faq.a2: It lets us control capacity and quality. Opening access slowly is better than onboarding more people than the infrastructure can comfortably handle.
faq.a3: For now we issue a compatible configuration and a guide. Our own client is in development, but access should not depend on a single app.

pricing_page.label: PRICING
pricing_page.subheadline: Personal configuration. Manual issue. No extra setup.
pricing_page.waitlist_description: Leave your email — we check available capacity and send the next step. Public checkout stays closed for now: quality first, scale later.
pricing_page.success_description: We will send the next step when capacity is available for new access. No newsletters.
pricing_page.error_description: Try again in a minute or message us on Telegram.
pricing_page.error_invalid_email: That looks invalid — check and resend.
pricing_page.step_1_body: Leave your email. We see the request and check whether there is capacity for new access.
pricing_page.step_2_body: If the pool is open, we send the next step and attach access to your PRSLOY ID.
pricing_page.step_3_body: Once issued, your dashboard shows a personal configuration and a short setup guide.
pricing_page.beta_note: No public checkout yet: access is issued manually during private beta

setup_page.label: SETUP
setup_page.title: Setup appears after access is issued
setup_page.subtitle: During private beta we do not publish technical setup on the landing page. Once access is issued, your dashboard shows a personal configuration and short setup steps.

steps.title: Request invite
steps.body: Submit a request and verify your email. If capacity is available, we attach access to your PRSLOY ID.

steps.title: Open dashboard
steps.body: Once issued, your dashboard shows a personal configuration and a guide for your access.

steps.title: Connect by guide
steps.body: Follow the dashboard steps. If something does not work, support will help manually.

setup_page.troubleshooting_body: Restart Happ. Make sure you're on the latest version. If it still won't work — message us on Telegram with a screenshot of the error, we reply within an hour.

dashboard_page.label: DASHBOARD
dashboard_page.title: Manage your subscription
dashboard_page.subtitle: Right now management lives in the Telegram bot — check key status, renew, regenerate the key, download the config. The web dashboard ships in the next release.
dashboard_page.feature_status_body: Whether your key is active, valid until when, how much traffic is left (if there's a cap).
dashboard_page.feature_renew_body: Pay for a new period without regenerating the key. The route is preserved, devices stay connected.
dashboard_page.feature_regen_body: If the key leaked or broke — issue a new one in one tap. The old one is automatically revoked.
dashboard_page.feature_config_body: Link or QR code for adding it to a new client. All your devices run off the same key.
dashboard_page.feature_support_body: Direct chat with an engineer. Not a bot, not autoresponders — a real person who sees your key and the infrastructure.
dashboard_page.feature_history_body: Payments and renewals list. No traffic telemetry — billing only.
dashboard_page.web_soon_body: Once manual issuing is stable, we will add more features directly in the browser dashboard — no Telegram detour.
dashboard_page.setup_body: Email login is built into the site, but the production KV storage and AUTH_SECRET env are not configured yet.
dashboard_page.auth_required_body: Create a PRSLOY ID or sign in to see your account, email status, and access key state.
dashboard_page.verify_body: Verify your email so support can safely attach an invite and access key to this account.
dashboard_page.verify_error: Could not send the email. Try again in a minute.
dashboard_page.key_ready_body: Your personal configuration is ready. Open the dashboard guide or copy the link into a compatible client.
dashboard_page.key_pending_body: No access key is attached to this account yet. We can now identify you by email; the next step is attaching invite issuing to this account.

auth.login_subtitle: Use the email and password you created on the site. Telegram is no longer required for web access.
auth.register_subtitle: Create a site account. We'll verify the email and attach access here when the invite is issued.
auth.invalid: Use a valid email and a password with at least 8 characters.
auth.email_exists: This email already has an account. Sign in instead.
auth.not_configured: Account storage is not connected yet.
auth.storage_not_configured: Redis storage is not visible. Check UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_KV_REST_API_URL and UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_KV_REST_API_TOKEN.
auth.secret_not_configured: AUTH_SECRET is missing or shorter than 32 characters.
auth.generic_error: Could not complete the request. Try again in a minute.

faq_page.label: FAQ
faq_page.title: What you need to know
faq_page.subtitle: Direct answers without public technical instructions.

items.a: An invite-only private access service. Once issued, you get a personal configuration and a setup guide in your dashboard.

items.q: Why invite-only and not for everyone?
items.a: Because quality matters more than growth. We open access in small pools so infrastructure stays calm and support can help each user.
For now access works through a compatible configuration and dashboard guide. Our own client is in development, but access should not depend on a single app.

items.q: How is the connection set up?
items.a: We do not publish technical schemes publicly. For the user it is simple: account, personal configuration, and a guide after access is issued.
We watch route quality and help switch if a specific configuration becomes unstable.

items.q: How many devices can I use?
items.a: The beta is meant for personal devices of one user. For family or team access, message support first.

items.q: How do I get an invite?
items.a: Leave your email on the pricing page. If capacity is available, we send the next step and attach access to your PRSLOY ID.
Public checkout is not open yet. During beta, access is issued manually: request first, capacity check, then the next step by email.
It is the beta access reference price so positioning is clear. Automatic checkout comes only after manual issuing is stable.
The minimum needed for account and access issuing: email, verification status, access status, and the technical identifier of the issued configuration.
No private access service deserves blind trust. Our honest stance: no magic promises, no unnecessary public schemes, and closed beta until quality is reliable.

privacy.label: PRIVACY
privacy.title: What we know about you
privacy.intro: This is not a corporate privacy policy with 40 clauses. Here's an honest list of what we collect, why, and how long we keep it.

sections.p: Only what's needed for the service to work: your Telegram ID (if you register through the bot) OR email (if you leave it on the site form), your key identifier in our provisioning system, subscription start and end date. That's it.

Activity logs (DNS queries, visited sites, peer IPs). Payment data (cards, account numbers) — these go directly to the payment gateway. Biometrics, contacts, geolocation. There are no email newsletters or marketing trackers on the site.

Public payment is not open right now. During private beta, access is issued manually after request and capacity check. If a paid step appears, terms and the payment processor will be shown before payment.

Your key record lives while the subscription is active + 90 days (in case of renewal). After that — deleted. Email from the waitlist form is kept until we send you the invite link, then deleted within 30 days if you don't subscribe.
Email service for confirmations and notifications, hosting for the site and infrastructure, Telegram if you message support. We do not share your activity history with third parties.

You can request deletion of any of your data — message us on Telegram. After identity verification (via the payment token), we delete within 7 days. You can choose not to give an email — register through the Telegram bot instead.
If we change something — we update the date at the top and post in the Telegram channel. We don't slip in material changes silently.

terms.label: TERMS
terms.title: Rules of use
terms.intro: Short rules. This is not an enterprise SLA — these are beta-service terms written so they can actually be read.

sections.p: A personal configuration for private access, access validity, and a dashboard guide. During private beta, issuing is manual so we can control quality.

sections.h: WHAT YOU CAN USE IT FOR
sections.p: Personal secure connectivity, protecting data on public networks, and access to your work and personal resources. Publicly distributing or reselling the key is not allowed.

sections.h: WHAT YOU CAN'T USE IT FOR
sections.p: Spam and DDoS. Attacks on infrastructure (ours or anyone else's). Distributing malware. Automated scraping above reasonable limits (thousands of requests per second). The operator reserves the right to disable the key without refund in case of abuse — but we'll ask first, then disable.

The service is in closed beta. We do everything we can to keep routes up 24/7, but we can't guarantee 100% uptime — that would be a lie. If a node falls, the route switches; if something stays down for a long time, we compensate by extending the subscription.
Public payment is closed for now. If access is issued through an individual paid step, payment and refund terms are fixed before payment. If something goes wrong, message support.

You can stop renewing at any time — just don't pay. We can stop servicing the key in case of these terms being violated — after notifying you on Telegram. If we terminate without your fault — we refund the unused portion of the payment.
We provide a technical private access service. How you use the connection is your responsibility. The service does not make you anonymous and is not a security guarantee by itself.
